product.name: ArSotina
descriptions: ArSotina, 100% Polyester sotina fabric for garment lining.
It can be used as a lining inside of the shoes.
ArSotina is a durable lining fabric for more hard conditions.
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 800N ; Weft > 800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 30N ; Weft > 25N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

stage1.noMatchReason: This is a generic 100% polyester lining fabric intended for garment lining and shoe lining, with no explicit statement of use in any of the listed sectors (military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hivis, medical, sport, architecture-building, or transport).

evidence: It can be used as a lining inside of the shoes.
ArSotina, 100% Polyester sotina fabric for garment lining.
primary.rationale: The product is explicitly described as usable for shoe lining, a direct footwear component use, though it is also a general garment lining fabric.

secondary.rationale: No other specific sector is explicitly stated; the fabric is a generic garment lining without named industry application beyond footwear.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: No explicit workwear or industrial garment context stated, only generic garment lining.

modelOutput.reviewReason: Generic lining fabric with dual use (garment and shoe lining); footwear use is explicit but garment lining use lacks a specific sector, creating ambiguity.
